title: DONYER POWER Convector Radiator Heater 2000W Room Heating with Adjustable Thermostat
features: ※ 3 settings in heating output：(Setting 1: 750W, Setting 2: 1250W, Setting 3: 2000W. Note: Setting 3 means both switches are turned on)
※ Have two supporters , two wall-mounted holes on the back, free-standing and wall mounted(Fixings Not Supplied)
※ It is recommended that old and ageing electrical sockets are used with caution to avoid problems such as short-circuiting of the power supply due to poor circuit contact.
※ Overheating automatic protection in three levels: manual temperature control, automatic temperature control and fuse
description: Product Description The DONYER POWER convector heater applies to the principle that thermal air is from bottom to top As featured with heat dissipation through air natural convection, it shows cold air enters the bottom of the heater and becomes thermal airflow quickly through the internal heating components before dispersing from the top of the machine and circulating in the room, to achieve the overall heating effect with efficient temperature increase and uniformity. Without the dry environment or oxygen consumption, it is more comfortable to be used by elderly people; without light or noise, it can enable babies to sleep well; without radiation, it is more relieved to be used by pregnant women. NOTE：If you want it to work continuously, turn the temperature control knob to the maximum.When you do not turn the temperature knob to the maximum, the convection will stop working when it is heated to the temperature specified by the knob. At this time, the heater will automatically start to cool down, and it can continue to turn on normally after five minutes. 360° Circulation Heating It has high strength under high-temperature conditions and is not easily deformed or changed with the structure in high-temperature operation; it has a long life span and high heating efficiency with highly efficient heat dissipation in a large square. The chip for intelligent temperature control enables the machine to be shut off automatically after reaching the setting temperature When the convection heater is knocked down, the overheating automatic protection will be started up before cutting the power off to stop the heater, avoiding some safety issues.
